is there a lore reason for why a unit is chaos or ultra realm? i get aequor and caro because of story
related to their ability or origin
realms are thematic
i dont think they ever go deep into it but the awakening process involves being "blessed" by some kind of eldritch power, its like making a contract with something
the realm is related to which lucky number you rolled
so as i like to say, ultra is "traversal, trickery, trade"
what theme is ultra? i dont think there is a common trait among ultra units
and freedom
ultra units have powers relating to dimensions
chaos is where everyone else who doesn't fit the other criterias go /jk
ah ok i see, wish they elaborate on it more
